message:
test(frankenterm-core): add 10 more VT conformance fixtures

Cover cursor movement (CUU/CUD/CUF/CUB + clamping), scroll down
(CSI T), delete line (CSI M), insert/delete chars (CSI @/P), SGR
attributes (bold, dim, italic, underline, strikethrough), erase
display (CSI 2 J), and 4-byte UTF-8 emoji. Total corpus now 21
fixtures across 7 categories.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+{
+  "name": "insert_delete_chars",
+  "description": "CSI @ inserts blank chars, CSI P deletes chars shifting left",
+  "initial_size": [10, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "414243444546471b5b313b33481b5b32401b5b313b36481b5b315058",
+  "comment": "Print ABCDEFG at (0,0)-(0,6), CUP(1,3) then ICH(2) inserts 2 blanks at col 2 pushing CDEFG right, CUP(1,6) then DCH(1) deletes D at col 5 and pulls EFG left, print X over E.",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 6 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 5, "char": "X" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 6, "char": "F" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 7, "char": "G" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "name": "sgr_italic_underline_strike",
+  "description": "SGR 3 italic, SGR 4 underline, SGR 9 strikethrough",
+  "initial_size": [10, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "1b5b336d411b5b306d1b5b346d421b5b306d1b5b396d431b5b306d44",
+  "comment": "SGR(3) italic A, reset, SGR(4) underline B, reset, SGR(9) strikethrough C, reset, D plain.",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 4 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A", "attrs": { "italic": true } },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "B", "attrs": { "underline": true } },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "C", "attrs": { "strikethrough": true } },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": "D" }
+    ]
+  }
+}
